Reviews Contact

Los Angeles' Roofing Experts

H&N Roofs delivers reliable roofing solutions across Southern California. Get a free quote today!

Call Now: +13237940700

Get a FREE Estimate Today!

Decades of Roofing Excellence in Los Angeles

H&N Roofs started with a simple goal: to provide Los Angeles homeowners with roofing they could depend on. Founded by two brothers after years working under other roofers, we decided to build a company that puts quality and integrity first. We understand the unique challenges of roofing in Southern California, from earthquake preparedness to weathering intense sun and Santa Ana winds.

Learn More About Us
Since 2014 Established
Locally Owned
Licensed & Insured
W2 Employees

Our Roofer Services

Professional roofer solutions tailored to your needs.

Roof Replacement

Complete roof replacement services for homes and businesses throughout Los Angeles.

Learn More →

Roof Repair

Expert roof repair services to fix leaks, damage, and other roofing problems.

Learn More →

Roof Inspection

Comprehensive roof inspections to identify potential problems and ensure the longevity of your roof.

Learn More →

Gutter Services

Gutter installation, repair, and cleaning to protect your home from water damage.

Learn More →

Skylight Services

Skylight installation and repair services to bring natural light into your home.

Learn More →

Emergency Roofing Services

24/7 emergency roofing services for urgent repairs and storm damage.

Learn More →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our roofer services.

How long does a roof replacement take?

The duration of a roof replacement depends on the size and complexity of the roof, as well as the type of materials being used. Most replacements take between 3-7 days.

What types of roofing materials do you offer?

We offer a wide range of roofing materials, including asphalt shingles, tile, metal, and more. Our team can help you choose the best option for your home and budget.

Do you offer financing options?

Yes, we offer financing options to help make roof replacement more affordable. Contact us to learn more about our financing plans.

Reviews From Our Roofer Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"H&N Roofs was fantastic! We had a leak in our roof after the recent rains, and they came out quickly to assess the damage. The repair was done efficiently and professionally, and the price was very reasonable. Highly recommend!"

Maria S. Roof Repair

"The team from H&N Roofs did a great job cleaning out our gutters. They were completely clogged with leaves and debris, and they cleared everything out quickly and efficiently. Our gutters are now flowing freely!"

David K. Gutter Cleaning

"We recently had H&N Roofs replace our entire roof, and we couldn't be happier with the results. The team was professional, courteous, and efficient. They did a fantastic job, and our new roof looks amazing! They even helped us choose the right shingles to match our 1920s Craftsman home in Pasadena."

Jessica L. Roof Replacement
